objective: Align STANDARDS.md, AGENT_REGISTRY.md, agents/*.md, CLAUDE.md, README.md to fix policy/language gaps G1.1-G1.4
scope_boundary: Policy and language alignment for governance surface files under issue #639 Slice A.
Owns AGENT_REGISTRY.md, agents/overlord-audit.md, agents/verify-completion.md, CLAUDE.md, README.md, CI workflow alignment, and issue-local artifacts.
Must not widen into implementation lane changes beyond the files in the PR diff.
Issue-local artifacts: structured plan, execution scope, handoff, closeout, validation, cross-review.
out_of_scope: New feature implementation beyond policy/language alignment.
Broad local-hook or fallback propagation work.
Any claim of repo-wide governance closure from this slice alone.
research_summary: Slice A covers policy and language gap remediation (G1.1-G1.4) across core governance surface files. The PR diff shows aligned changes to CLAUDE.md, README.md, AGENT_REGISTRY.md, agents/overlord-audit.md, agents/verify-completion.md, and CI workflow files. Stage 6 artifacts are required before merge.

sprints.name: Policy Language Alignment
sprints.goal: Fix G1.1-G1.4 policy and language gaps across governance surface files.
tasks: Align AGENT_REGISTRY.md with correct model pins.
Update agents/overlord-audit.md and agents/verify-completion.md frontmatter model pins.
Align CLAUDE.md and README.md routing table language.
Fix CI workflow SHA pinning and governance check alignment.
Produce Stage 6 closeout, execution scope, handoff, cross-review, and validation artifacts.
acceptance_criteria: All governance surface files pass the local CI gate profile for hldpro-governance.
PR diff contains only issue-639 Slice A owned surfaces.
Stage 6 closeout artifact is present and validates.
Execution scope lists all changed paths.
Handoff package is accepted and validated.

specialist_reviews.focus: Identify G1.1-G1.4 policy and language gaps in governance surface files and scope the bounded Slice A fix.
specialist_reviews.summary: G1.1-G1.4 gaps identified in AGENT_REGISTRY.md model pins, agents/*.md frontmatter, CLAUDE.md and README.md routing table language, and CI workflow alignment. Fix is bounded to those surfaces only.

alternate_model_review.summary: Alternate-family (openai/codex) review of Slice A policy/language alignment. G1.1-G1.4 gaps addressed within bounded scope. Stage 6 artifacts present and validated. No architecture changes detected.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #639 Slice A is authorized for bounded policy/language gap alignment only: AGENT_REGISTRY.md, agents/*.md model pins, CLAUDE.md, README.md routing language, CI workflow alignment, and issue-local governance artifacts.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Artifacts are staged. Run validators and commit.
handoff_acceptance_criteria: AC1: Issue #639 Slice A remains bounded to governance surface file language alignment and issue-local artifacts only.
AC2: All G1.1-G1.4 policy/language gaps are addressed within the owned surfaces.
AC3: Stage 6 closeout artifact is present and passes validate_closeout.py.

material_deviation_rules: Any implementation change beyond policy/language alignment in the named files is a material deviation.
Any claim that issue #639 Slice A closes broader governance enforcement is a material deviation.
